fragen.frage: How does your body feel right now, in this moment?
Where in your body do you feel tension – and may it soften a little?
When did you last consciously let your shoulders drop?
Are you sitting or standing comfortably right now, or would you like to change your posture?
Which part of your body could you treat a little more lovingly today?
Do you feel more tired or more energetic right now – and what does that tell you?
When did you last consciously stretch today?
Are you warm enough right now, or could it be a bit cosier?
What would do your body good in the next few minutes?
How deeply are you breathing right now – rather shallow, or calm and full?
Would you like to simply breathe for three breaths and do nothing else?
How would a slow, deep breath feel right now?
What happens if you let go a little on your next exhale?
Where can you find a brief moment of quiet today?
What calms you when everything feels like a lot right now?
When today did you have a moment where nothing was asked of you?
May things be quiet and slow for a while right now?
What does silence sound like to you – rather pleasant or unfamiliar?
What helps you settle inwardly?
Would you like to close your eyes for a moment and simply be here?
When did you last take a real break today?
What gives you energy right now – and what drains it?
Do you need a break right now, or a little push?
How full does your battery feel today?
What small break could you give yourself in the next hour?
Are you doing too much at once right now?
What could you leave out today with a clear conscience?
When did you last allow yourself to simply do nothing?
What does you good when you’re exhausted?
How does it feel to take a breath before carrying on?
What are you grateful for today – even something very small?
What made you smile today?
Who has done you good lately?
Which little thing today was nicer than you expected?
What about your day today would you like to hold on to?
What are you grateful for in yourself right now?
Which moment today was calm and pleasant?
What in your life is good right now, just as it is?
Who might you still want to thank today?
What that you take for granted is actually a small gift?
How are you really doing right now – not just “okay”?
Which feeling accompanies you most today?
May what you feel simply be here, without pushing it away?
What would you like to say to your feeling right now?
What do you need most emotionally right now?
Is there something on your mind today that would need some space?
When did you last feel really at ease today?
What would help you feel a bit lighter right now?
Are you rather strict or kind with yourself today?
Which mood would you like to carry into the rest of the day?
What do you need most urgently right now?
Is there a “no” today that would actually feel good?
Are you taking enough time for yourself?
What do you do for others that you could also grant yourself?
Where may you set a boundary today?
What are you no longer willing to let happen to you today?
Are you listening to what your body is telling you right now?
Which of your needs has been coming up short lately?
What would you wish for if you dared to say it out loud?
Is it okay to put yourself first today, too?
What would bring you joy today – for no reason at all?
What little thing could you treat yourself to today?
When did you last laugh really heartily?
What brings you joy in your everyday life right now?
Which small ritual does you good?
What would you do if you gave yourself 15 minutes just for you today?
What music would match your mood right now?
What is your favourite little moment on an ordinary day?
What almost always lifts your mood?
What would you like to bring more of into your day today?
Who would a short moment of contact do you good with today?
When did you last feel truly close to someone?
Who could you bring a little joy to today?
Who makes you feel free to be exactly who you are?
Is there someone you’re missing right now whom you could message?
When did you last feel understood?
Who in your life deserves a thank-you today?
Do you feel like showing up today, or rather withdrawing?
What connects you with the people who matter to you?
When did you last dare to ask for help?
What do you notice right now if you pause for a moment?
What three things can you see, hear and feel in this moment?
What do you smell or taste right now – quite consciously?
How does the ground feel under your feet?
What is actually okay in this very moment?
Can you let this moment simply be, for a few seconds?
What would you notice if you slowed down?
Where is your attention right now – here, or somewhere else entirely?
What changes if you give the present moment your full attention?
What is the most beautiful thing you can see around you right now?
Would you speak to a good friend the way you speak to yourself right now?
What would you say to yourself if you were your own best friend?
What may you be proud of yourself for today?
What have you already managed today – even if it was small?
Are you allowed to be imperfect today, too?
What would you like to forgive yourself for?
How could you treat yourself a little more gently today?
Which kind sentence would you like to give yourself today?
What do you like about yourself – even if it’s hard to admit?
Do you acknowledge how much you’re actually carrying right now?
Did you get enough rest last night?
What would help you unwind this evening?
When would you ideally go to rest today?
What sometimes keeps you from sleeping well?
How could you wind down your evening a little more calmly today?
Do you feel rested right now, or rather tired?
What does you good before going to sleep?
Do you allow yourself enough real rest – not just distraction?
What would make a restful evening for you?
When did you last allow yourself a really lazy moment?
Have you already been outside in the fresh air today?
How would a short walk feel right now?
Might your body like to move a little today?
When did you last consciously look up at the sky?
What would a few minutes in nature give you?
Would you like to stand up briefly and stretch?
How does fresh air or sunlight feel on your skin?
What movement would bring you joy today, with no pressure at all?
When were you last simply outside, with no goal?
What kind of movement would do your body good today?
Which thought keeps going round in your head right now?
Of the things you worry about, what can you actually influence right now?
What could you consciously let go of today?
What would you like to give less attention today?
What is truly important right now – and what is just loud?
Which thought would do you good if you thought it more often?
What would you advise yourself if you took a step back for a moment?
Are you putting more pressure on yourself than necessary right now?
What if today is enough, just as it is?
Which worry may you set aside for the moment?
What truly matters to you today?
When did you last feel truly alive?
What gives your day meaning right now?
What do you like getting up for in the morning?
Which value should guide your day today?
What would you like to be able to say about yourself at the end of the day?
What would make your life a little richer right now?
What would you like more of in your life, and what less?
What is good for you long-term, even if it takes effort short-term?
When do you feel most like yourself?
Have you had enough to drink today?
When did you last calmly treat yourself to something good?
What would give you strength right now?
Will you treat yourself to something today that’s just for your well-being?
What does your well-being most good right now?
How can you kindly care for yourself today?
What do you need to feel safe and secure?
What small act of care can you give yourself in the next few minutes?
What would a loving person advise you right now?
If you do just one thing for yourself today – what would it be?
